title: coelogyne triloba
intro: Coelogyne triloba, also known as the three-lobed orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical forests of Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. In herbal preparations, Coelogyne triloba is often used in infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
